outcomes.rollFlavourText: Grid throughput collapses as demand craters — oversupply floods the distribution network.
Stable throughput, holding rate — the grid hums at breakeven.
Demand ticks up across the network; distribution margins widen.
Peak load season hits — the grid is at capacity and prices spike across every region.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×2. Choose 1 other player: their ENERGY assets treat negative GMI as halved this year. Druid party support — Geologist gives this to one ally in a downturn.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Choose 1 other player: their ENERGY assets treat negative GMI as halved this year. Druid party support — Geologist gives this to one ally in a downturn.
Treat repayment roll as one higher.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap after 2 consecutive years without a negative value roll.

cardDescription: T1 Energy downstream. GMI amplified ×2 — bad macro years hit twice as hard. Steady income offset by amplified volatility; party support ability buffers one ally's ENERGY exposure in downturns.
flavourText: Everyone needs power. Nobody thanks the grid.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Throughput volumes crater — glut conditions back up the pipeline with nowhere to go.
Volumes steady, tariffs unchanged — the pipeline moves product at breakeven margins.
Upstream supply contracts push higher tariff rates through the midstream network.
Supply crunch locks in premium transit rates — every barrel pays to move.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×2. Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT has no once-per-year limit while this asset is held. Non-Geologist: the cost-to-peek ability from UPSTREAM fires at no card discard cost this year.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT has no once-per-year limit while this asset is held. Non-Geologist: the cost-to-peek ability from UPSTREAM fires at no card discard cost this year.
+1 income per year while both MID and DN are held.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +2).

cardDescription: T1 Energy midstream. GMI amplified ×2 — commodity downturns hit hard across the transit network. Unlocks Geologist FORESIGHT advantages and cheaper event-peeking for non-Geologist players.
flavourText: The pipeline doesn't care what flows through it.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: The well comes in dry — commodity prices collapse and the drilling rights are worth next to nothing.
Marginal flow rates hold — the field produces but spot prices keep the value flat.
A new strike confirms reserves — demand for the rights ticks up with the commodity price.
Wildcat pays off: record-grade reserves confirmed as prices surge — the drilling rights are suddenly very valuable.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×2. Geologist CEO: this asset's ownership enables FORESIGHT ability use (once per year per CEO card). Non-Geologist: once per year, after the global event card is drawn but before value rolls, you may draw and immediately discard 1 personal event card to look at the next global event card without revealing it. Information at cost.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Geologist CEO: this asset's ownership enables FORESIGHT ability use (once per year per CEO card). Non-Geologist: once per year, after the global event card is drawn but before value rolls, you may draw and immediately discard 1 personal event card to look at the next global event card without revealing it. Information at cost.

cardDescription: T1 Energy upstream. GMI amplified ×2 — commodity gluts devastate exploration-stage assets. No income; value is pure speculative upside and the FORESIGHT information advantage it unlocks.
flavourText: The drill doesn't know the difference between oil and optimism.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Offshore output floods an already saturated market — spot prices collapse under the oversupply.
Production holds steady offshore; modest demand tick keeps margins slightly positive.
Demand surge hits the seaborne market — offshore barrels command a premium at current prices.
Supply crunch goes global — the platform is producing flat-out into a record price environment.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×2. Your own ENERGY assets halve negative GMI this year. (Party-wide protection belongs on global events, not individual asset bonuses.)

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Your own ENERGY assets halve negative GMI this year. (Party-wide protection belongs on global events, not individual asset bonuses.)
+1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 24.

cardDescription: T2 Energy downstream. GMI amplified ×2 — macro downturns hit at double force, but vertical integration halves negative GMI exposure across your own ENERGY portfolio. High-risk, high-ceiling asset.
flavourText: Sixty miles offshore, regulations are suggestions.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Transmission demand collapses as industrial load falls — the grid carries air at a loss.
Baseline load holds — regulated tariffs keep throughput revenue marginally positive.
Industrial demand spikes across the network — transmission capacity tightens and tariffs lift.
National demand peaks at record levels — every megawatt of capacity is spoken for at boom-cycle prices.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×2. Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT allows swapping the top 2 event cards' positions in addition to the look/move choice. Non-Geologist: once per year, swap the top 2 global event cards without looking at either (blind swap).

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT allows swapping the top 2 event cards' positions in addition to the look/move choice. Non-Geologist: once per year, swap the top 2 global event cards without looking at either (blind swap).
Value cannot fall below 10 from any single event.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap; +1 additional if value exceeds 22.

cardDescription: T2 Energy midstream. GMI amplified ×2 — systemic macro shocks hit the grid at double magnitude. Offers event-deck manipulation and a crash floor via vertical integration; strategic information control at scale.
flavourText: The grid is the economy. Everything else is commentary.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Crude glut tanks feedstock margins — the refinery runs at a loss as crack spreads invert.
Refining margins hold thin — throughput volumes steady with a modest crack spread improvement.
Product demand surges downstream — refinery runs at full capacity with widening margins.
Supply crunch drives crack spreads to record highs — the refinery prints at every barrel processed.

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Choose up to 2 other players: their ENERGY assets halve negative GMI this year. Druid party-wide protection at T2 — note this targets other players only, not yourself.

cardDescription: T2 Energy upstream. GMI amplified ×2 — commodity downturns compress crack spreads at twice the macro rate. Low stress for tier; vertical integration provides party-wide GMI protection for up to two other players.
flavourText: Crude in, margin out. The rest is chemistry.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Renewable overcapacity floods the grid — power prices collapse as supply overwhelms demand across the network.
Generation output holds at rated capacity — grid offtake steady, prices flat but positive.
Demand surge stresses the grid — renewable capacity commands a premium as the energy transition accelerates.
Supply crunch triggers emergency procurement — the sovereign's clean capacity is priced at the top of the merit order across every market it serves.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×3 at T3. Geologist CEO raises to ×4. Your own ENERGY assets are immune to negative GMI this year. (Previously party-wide — scoped to owner only.)

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Your own ENERGY assets are immune to negative GMI this year. (Previously party-wide — scoped to owner only.)
−1 stress in any year GMI is positive.

cardDescription: T3 Energy downstream. GMI amplified ×3 (×4 with Geologist) — macro shocks are devastating at this scale. Full vertical integration grants immunity to negative GMI for your entire ENERGY portfolio and stress reduction in bull years.
flavourText: The sun doesn't send invoices. The sovereign does.

outcomes.rollFlavourText: Petrochemical feedstock demand collapses — an oversupplied crude market obliterates upstream margins at scale.
Feedstock volumes hold — petrochemical offtake steady as downstream processors run at base rates.
Industrial demand spike pulls hard on petrochemical supply — pricing power returns to the upstream.
Global supply crunch locks every molecule into a seller's market — the Giant is running flat-out at record commodity prices.

baseValueUpdateRule.industryMechanic: GMI amplified ×3 at T3. Geologist CEO raises to ×4 per updated CEO ability. Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT allows peeking 2 cards ahead and swapping the top 2. Non-Geologist: once per year, look at the top global event card and choose to keep or move it (as standard, but no swap).

verticalIntegrationRules.effectDescription: Geologist CEO: FORESIGHT allows peeking 2 cards ahead and swapping the top 2. Non-Geologist: once per year, look at the top global event card and choose to keep or move it (as standard, but no swap). GMI ×3 baseline for all players. Geologist CEO raises to ×4 per updated CEO ability.

crossIndustrySynergies.effectDescription: +1 loan cap for each MFG asset you own (max +3).

cardDescription: T3 Energy upstream. GMI amplified ×3 (×4 with Geologist) — the highest commodity amplifier in the game means a bad macro year is catastrophic. Exceptional upside ceiling; Geologist FORESIGHT reaches two cards deep at this tier.
flavourText: Petrochemicals built the twentieth century. The twenty-first just pretends otherwise.
